   const n = nums.length;

   const sorted_abs = nums.map(x => Math.abs(x)).sort((a, b) => a - b);

      const low = current / 2;

      const high = current * 2;

      let low_idx = i + 1;

      let high_idx = n - 1;

         const mid = Math.floor((low_idx + high_idx) / 2);

         if (sorted_abs[mid] >= low) {

            left = mid;

            high_idx = mid - 1;

         } else {

      low_idx = i + 1;

      if (left !== -1 && right !== -1 && left <= right) {
